fault_hypothesis: The expiry check on line 73 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), but it should be greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`). This causes entries to be considered valid when the current time is exactly equal to the expiry time.

constraints.intent: The check for expiry fails at the boundary where current time equals expiry time.
A value should only be returned if the current time is strictly before the effective expiry.
The expiry timestamp extracted from the entry must be non-negative.
